case_title: MACKENZIE COMSTOCK VS. UNITED AIRLINES, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $387.21 FILED BY COMSTOCK, MACKENZIE AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-12-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF COMSTOCK, MACKENZIE AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES, INC.
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR THE DEFENDANT TO SUBMIT A VIDEO APPEARANCE PACKET.
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR JILL MOFFATT TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF UNITED AIRLINES FILED BY DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-18-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-17-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MACKENZIE COMSTOCK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JILL MOFFETT, CUSTOMER CARE REPRESENTATIVE. CASES CSM-20-863900 AND CSM 20-863901 WERE HEARD TOGETHER. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT ON BOTH CASES IN COURT FOR A TOTAL PAYMENT OF 50,000 MILES TO THE PLAINTIFF'S MILEAGE PLUS ACCOUNT. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE JUNE 17TH HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-12-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAY-18-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MACKENZIE COMSTOCK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES, INC. IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE, REPRESENTED BY JILL MOFFATT, CUSTOMER CARE MANAGER. CASE CONTINUED FOR THE DEFENDANT TO SUBMIT A VIDEO APPEARANCE PACKET. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.(SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-17-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES, INC.
REMARK: DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS SUBMITTED WITH SC-109

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
